logline: A veteran surgeon must choose between saving a patient on the table and testifying against the hospital that trained him.
A public defender discovers that her most recent acquittal freed a man who is now her neighbor.
A grieving father takes a cross-country road trip to scatter his son's ashes and meets the stranger who donated his son's heart.
A war correspondent returns home to find her marriage and career in ruins, and must rebuild both from scratch.
A small-town mayor uncovers a decades-old cover-up that implicates her own family.
A hospice nurse forms an unexpected bond with a dying mobster who wants to confess his crimes before he goes.
A high school principal fights to keep her school open after a student tragedy threatens to destroy the community.
An estranged daughter returns home to care for her ailing father and discovers he led a secret second life.
A public housing activist is offered a deal by a developer that would save her building but betray her neighbors.
A detective investigating a cold case realizes the prime suspect is someone she once loved.
A single mother working two jobs discovers her teenage son has been secretly supporting the family with money she can't trace.
A renowned architect is hired to design a memorial for a disaster she survived but never publicly acknowledged.
A therapist treating survivors of a factory fire realizes she was indirectly responsible for the conditions that caused it.
A wrongfully convicted man is released after 20 years and struggles to connect with the daughter who grew up without him.
A foreign diplomat's interpreter begins to suspect her own government of orchestrating a humanitarian crisis.
A burned-out ER doctor takes a sabbatical in a rural village and discovers a mysterious illness the locals refuse to report.
A social worker fights to keep siblings together in foster care while battling a broken system that wants to separate them.
A retired judge is called back to preside over a case involving her former protégé — now accused of murder.
A marine biologist discovers evidence of illegal dumping linked to the company that funds her research.
A journalist embedded with a refugee family documents their harrowing journey while wrestling with her own privilege.
An immigration lawyer defends a client whose case forces her to confront her own undocumented past.
A newly elected senator must decide whether to support a bill that would help her constituents but destroy her political future.
A documentary filmmaker returns to the community she exploited in her debut film to make amends — and discovers things have only gotten worse.
A paroled woman tries to reconnect with her teenage son, who has been raised by the family of the man she killed.
A union organizer at a tech company faces pressure from all sides when a strike vote splits the workforce.
A police chaplain begins to question her faith after a series of officer-involved shootings tears her precinct apart.
A marine veteran with PTSD takes a job as a school counselor and becomes the only adult a troubled student will talk to.
A climate scientist's research is suppressed by her own university after it implicates a major donor.
A pediatric oncologist must break protocol to give a terminal child the experimental treatment the parents are demanding.
A foster parent fighting to adopt a child discovers the biological mother has been located — and is willing to fight back.
A prosecutor builds a case against a beloved community leader, knowing a conviction will tear the neighborhood apart.
A factory town faces collapse when its only employer announces closure, and a local councilman must weigh loyalty against survival.
A humanitarian aid worker is taken hostage and must negotiate her own release using only her knowledge of her captors' culture.
A night-shift nurse at an understaffed hospital faces an impossible choice when two critical patients need the same resource.
A disgraced politician attempts a comeback by championing a cause she previously voted against.
A forensic accountant uncovers embezzlement that runs all the way to the top of the charity she works for.
A widowed teacher raises her four children alone while secretly battling early-onset Alzheimer's.
A veteran cop nearing retirement is assigned to train the rookie who reported his partner for misconduct.
A teenager goes searching for the biological father she was never supposed to know and unravels a family secret spanning three generations.
A priest is asked to investigate a miracle in his own parish and must decide whether faith or truth matters more.
A long-haul trucker discovers a child hiding in his trailer and must decide whether to call authorities or protect her from what she's running from.
An undercover agent who has spent years embedded in a criminal network is ordered to bring down the man who has become his closest friend.
A prominent architect's perfect life begins to unravel when she discovers her husband has been living a double life for years.
A small-town coroner begins to notice a pattern in what are being ruled accidental deaths.
A retired civil rights attorney is forced out of retirement when a young activist she mentored is falsely imprisoned.
A nurse practitioner in a rural border town provides healthcare to undocumented workers despite escalating threats from local authorities.
A foster child ages out of the system at 18 and must navigate adulthood entirely alone, clinging to the one social worker who still believes in her.
A tech CEO diagnosed with a terminal illness tries to reconcile with the employees she laid off to fund the treatment keeping her alive.
A beloved high school coach is accused of misconduct by a former player, splitting the community between loyalty and justice.
A young public health worker battles bureaucracy and distrust while trying to contain an outbreak in a community that has every reason not to trust the government.
